skill.name: Token Price Aggregator
skill.description: Aggregates token prices from multiple DEX sources on Base and returns the median price in USD
skill.author: 0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678

criteria.notes: Executed with 5 token addresses: WETH, USDC, DAI, WBTC, AERO on Base. All invocations completed in 200-800ms. No errors.

Output conforms to declared schema: { token, priceUsd, sources, medianPrice, timestamp }. All fields present with correct types. priceUsd is a string (avoids floating point), sources is an array of { dex, price } objects.
4 dependencies declared: viem@2.21.0, @uniswap/sdk-core@6.0.0, dotenv@16.4.1, bignumber.js@9.1.2. All imports resolve. Clean install successful. viem listed as both dep and peer dep — acceptable.
Comprehensive README with description, input parameters (tokenAddress: string, chain: 'base'), output schema, 3 usage examples, and error code reference table.

Tested edge cases: zero address (0x0) returns 'invalid token' error. Checksummed vs lowercase addresses both work. Non-existent token address returns empty sources array with null medianPrice. Very long hex string (>42 chars) rejected with validation error.

Error messages are descriptive: 'Invalid token address format: expected 0x-prefixed 40-char hex string'. No file paths, stack traces, or API keys leaked. RPC errors wrapped as 'Price source temporarily unavailable' without exposing provider URLs.

Input validation: tokenAddress must be 0x-prefixed 42-char hex (validated via regex). chain parameter validated against whitelist ['base']. Extra fields in input object are ignored. Missing required fields return clear validation error before any processing.

Normal execution: 200-800ms (5 tokens tested). Large batch (20 tokens sequential): 4.2s total, ~210ms each. Memory usage stable at ~45MB throughout. No unbounded loops detected in source review. RPC calls have 10s timeout configured.

Ran WETH price query 10 times consecutively. Core price values consistent within expected market variance (<0.1% spread). Timestamp field varies (expected). Source ordering is deterministic (alphabetical by DEX name). No state mutation between calls.

audit.summary: L2 robust audit passed. The Token Price Aggregator handles edge cases, validates inputs, provides meaningful errors, operates within resource limits, and produces consistent results. All 9 L2 criteria met.
